query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.role, u.consultorId, c.name as consultorName, c.canLogin, c.loginId, c.role as consultorRole
FROM users u 
LEFT JOIN consultors c ON u.consultorId = c.id
WHERE u.role = 'manager' AND u.consultorId IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY u.name;
